creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've been locally updating the snapshot for months without issues. Tested mainly on Skylake GT2 + drm-stable-kmod (Linux 4.9) + i965 (DRI3) + intel (SNA, DRI3) via mpv (EGL + VAAPI), rpcs3 (OpenGL 4.3+), firefox (WebRender).

Build logs:
10.4 amd64: https://clbin.com/m04P5
10.4 i386:  https://clbin.com/frTZa
11.1 amd64: https://clbin.com/LgBOO
11.1 i386:  https://clbin.com/zgEfx
12.0 amd64: https://clbin.com/6mjiR
12.0 i386:  https://clbin.com/2ctGs

Carlos or Kevin, can you check for regressions on FreeBSD < 11.2?
